Desktop tray + application menu unit tests (rename verification)
Run: bunx vitest run packages/app-core/src/runtime/desktop/tray-menu.test.ts
     bunx vitest run --config vitest.electrobun.config.ts src/application-menu.test.ts

tray-menu.test.ts        Test Files 1 passed (1)   Tests 4 passed (4)
application-menu.test.ts Test Files 1 passed (1)   Tests 10 passed (10)

Asserts covered: "Open Messages" tray item, Views submenu (Messages/Character/
Knowledge/Settings/Background + Tutorial/Help), Notifications item, and the
renderer<->bun view-list sync.
